rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of a grouped literature citation listing prior announcement-event studies, specifically as an example of work on joint ventures and short-term abnormal returns. The citing paper does not engage the cited paper's contract-versus-JV framework, determinants, or findings in its theory, hypotheses, or interpretation. Its core argument and empirical setup are built from signaling/agency and structural-uncertainty literature rather than from this specific study.
